message:
bench: add Arc vs deep-clone streaming performance comparison

Add a criterion benchmark group (streaming_clone) that measures the
performance difference between the new Arc::make_mut + Arc::clone
pattern and the old deep-clone pattern for streaming event emission:

- arc_make_mut_clone_500tok: simulates 500 tokens building a ~10KB
  response using Arc::make_mut for mutation (O(1) when refcount=1)
  and Arc::clone for sharing with two event consumers (O(1) refcount)
- deep_clone_500tok: same workload using direct mutation + .clone()
  for sharing (O(accumulated_text) per clone)

This provides reproducible evidence that the Arc migration delivers
the expected performance improvement for the streaming hot path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
